texto: This felt real. This felt like the moons had aligned and the stars were shining in our favor and every breath was ours, every touch was right. This felt like eternity in a blink, like our lives unraveled and spun together, like the convergence of always and never and every step I've ever taken and every pain I've ever endured lead to that moment.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ava Jae: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “This felt real. This felt like the moons had aligned and the stars were shining in our favor and …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, eternity, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e love.
